allow: Bash(node -e "import\('pino-pretty-logs'\).then\(m => { const l = m.default || m.logger; console.log\(typeof l, Object.keys\(l || {}\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('pino-pretty-logs'\).then\(m => { const mod = m.default || m; const l = mod.logger || mod; console.log\(typeof l\); const methods = ['info','warn','error','debug','trace','fatal','child']; methods.forEach\(fn => console.log\(fn, typeof l[fn]\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('pino-pretty-logs'\).then\(m => { const mod = m.default || m; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(mod\)\)\); const l = mod.logger; l.info\('test info'\); l.warn\('test warn'\); l.error\('test error'\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('pino-pretty-logs'\).then\(m => { console.log\('named logger:', typeof m.logger\); m.logger.info\({market: 'test', side: 'BUY'}, 'Trade detected'\); }\)")
